metadata.title: Revision Policy Template | FlowDockr
metadata.description: A freelancer-ready revision policy template to control scope creep.

hero.title: Revision Policy Template
hero.description: Use this structure to define included revisions, out-of-scope handling, and approval steps.

items.title: Included revision rounds
items.description: State exact number and what counts as a revision.

items.title: Out-of-scope changes
items.description: Define quote-first or hourly change policy.

items.title: Confirmation line
items.description: Ask for explicit client approval before proceeding.

cta.title: Need client-ready wording fast?
cta.description: Use Scope Guard to generate tailored policy text in minutes.
